title: ItemToCoin
description: This mod converts items into the currency used by sdmshop.
body:
# **Mod Description:‚Äã‚Äã**

This mod converts items into the currency used by sdmshop.

[‰∏≠Êñá](https://github.com/AFoolLove/ItemToCoin)

# **‚Äã‚ÄãControls:‚Äã‚Äã**

‚Äã‚ÄãRight-click‚Äã‚Äã: Convert a single held item into SDM currency

‚Äã‚ÄãSneak + Right-click‚Äã‚Äã: Convert the entire stack of held items into SDM currency

# **‚Äã‚ÄãConfiguration File:‚Äã‚Äã**

Path: `./config/itemtocoin/toCoins.json`

# **‚Äã‚ÄãParameter Definitions:‚Äã‚Äã**

`amount`: Number of items consumed per conversion

`type`: Type of currency (e.g., coins, points)

`rate`: Exchange rate (how much currency per item)

You can find detailed usage instructions on **GitHub.**

# **Required Mod‚Äã:**

https://modrinth.com/mod/sdm-shop
